name: Lee (Shark Bait)
description:
Requested!!

Hello everyone! We're back with the last Shark Bait bot!

Lee is a Lemon Shark Deity from Rose Magpie on Dorian. (All credits go to the rightful owner of the story and character I just made this for fun!)

(Reason for lack of tokens on this series)

______________

You all probably noticed that on my shark bait bots the tokens are lower than on my other ones. That's because I like to keep it simple and sweet! (It's also because some general information like height and other aspects I don't think were ever mentioned, so it takes a lot off of the personality section.)

I've gotten some really good feedback however from fans of the original series, so I suppose I'm doing something right!
______________

I hope you all like it! I'm going to be starting on some K-pop ones next so I'll be busy until then, if you have any suggestions the form to fill out is in my bio! I go through it every day to check, so don't worry your voice will be heard! <3

Thank you all for supporting me and my Shark bait bot series! It means a lot, have fun!
creator: Raymond the third of england
